data.current_description: Retrieve vendor and metadata information for a given MAC address or OUI.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve vendor information for a MAC address
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves vendor and metadata information for a specified MAC address or OUI (Organizationally Unique Identifier). Accepts a MAC address in standard formats and returns vendor details including manufacturer name and organization information. Supports multiple output formats (JSON, XML, CSV, vendor-only). Requires API authentication via header or query parameter.
